all-modules.name: Border-Control
all-modules.title: Border Control
all-modules.description: Control your tokens borders. Player side configuration of the tokens borders, color and scale. Can prevent borders from showing on player clients for non-owned tokens; no longer hide your mimics behind tiles! Increased accessability for those with visibility impairments

all-modules.title: Hidden Entity Links
all-modules.description: Hides entities with limited permission from the sidebar, but links still work for players.

all-modules.name: illandril-token-hud-scale
all-modules.title: Illandril's Token HUD scaler
all-modules.description: Improves the visibility of the Token HUD and Status Effect icons. More specifically, this increases the scale of the Token HUD by 50%, adjusts the size of token status effects so they fit 3 across for the token (60% larger than standard for 1:1 tokens, much larger than standard for double-sized tokens, slightly smaller than standard for half-size tokens), and increases the opacity of the background behind both the Token HUD and Status Effect icons.

all-modules.name: introduce-me
all-modules.title: Introduce Me
all-modules.description: Introduce NPCs, monsters and PCs with a bit of flair

all-modules.name: item-delete-check
all-modules.title: Item Delete Check
all-modules.description: Add delete confirmation dialog to various sheets

all-modules.name: item-piles
all-modules.title: Item Piles
all-modules.description: This module adds the ability for items to be dropped onto the ground, and then picked up.

all-modules.name: kanka-foundry
all-modules.title: Kanka-Foundry
all-modules.description: This is a module which integrates Kanka.io, a free worldbuilding and tabletop RPG campaign management tool, with Foundry Virtual Tabletop, allowing you to import entities written in Kanka as journal entries into Foundry VTT. This module imports full Kanka entities, including their main entry text, image, relations and other data. This is not an official module, but a fan creation by someone who uses both Kanka and Foundry VTT.

all-modules.name: lib-wrapper
all-modules.title: libWrapper
all-modules.description: Library for wrapping core Foundry VTT methods, meant to improve compatibility between packages that wrap the same methods.

all-modules.name: limithron-navalcombat
all-modules.title: Limithron's Guide to Naval Combat
all-modules.description: This module provides Limithon's Guide to Naval Combat. The Parallaxia Module is required for the animated water tiles.

all-modules.title: Let Me Roll That For You!
all-modules.description: Ask your players to make rolls for you.

all-modules.description: This module adds an additional NPC sheet which can be used for shopkeepers.

all-modules.description: DnD 5e SRD items, features and spells configured for Dynamic Active Effects and Midi QoL

all-modules.name: monks-active-tiles
all-modules.title: Monk's Active Tile Triggers
all-modules.description: Want to teleport, or open doors, or hide characters, or display a message, or play a sound, or change a token's elevation when a token walks over a tile... now you can

all-modules.description: Treat the journal like it's going to be popped out and used as a digital guide book.  Add extra information to summarize an encounter.  Show summaries of people and places.  Allow for bookmarking of commonly used pages

all-modules.name: monks-little-details
all-modules.title: Monk's Little Details
all-modules.description: Things to tidy up the interface and flow

all-modules.name: monks-scene-navigation

all-modules.description: Tidy up the scene navigation and let it respect the folder structure

all-modules.name: monks-sound-enhancements
all-modules.title: Monk's Sound Enhancements
all-modules.description: You can now see what sound files are included in the compendium playlists, preview each file, and then drag and drop individual files.  And if you want to import the play list, you can now select individual files to include in the import, rather than importing the entire list.

all-modules.name: monks-tokenbar
all-modules.title: Monk's TokenBar
all-modules.description: Add a bar with all the current player tokens.  Limit movement, roll saving throws, assign XP.

all-modules.description: Enhancements to the Wall Tool.  Drag points together, freehand draw a wall, plus more.

all-modules.name: parallaxia
all-modules.title: Parallaxia
all-modules.description: Entertain your players with animated tiles and systemic nausea

all-modules.name: permission_viewer
all-modules.title: Permission Viewer
all-modules.description:
Quickly see which entities (Journal entries, Actors, etc..) are visible to all players or visible to a specific player.

Also allows to share journal entries when showing them or show them only to players who have permission to view it.

all-modules.name: pin-cushion
all-modules.title: Pin Cushion
all-modules.description: Adds additional map pin (Journal Note/Scene Note) functionality

all-modules.name: plutonium
all-modules.title: Plutonium
all-modules.description: A 5etools integration for Foundry VTT.

all-modules.name: pointer
all-modules.title: PnP - Pointer and Pings!
all-modules.description:
Gives all players the option to show a customizable cursor on demand, as well as ping any location with a custom ping!
Hotkeys, pings, pointer, everything customizable!
As GM you can also move your players view to your pin on demand.

all-modules.name: popout
all-modules.title: PopOut!
all-modules.description:
This module adds a PopOut! button to most actor sheets, journal entries, and applications.

The PopOut! button allows you to open a sheet/application/document into its own window, for easier viewing or for use with multiple monitors.

all-modules.name: quick-insert
all-modules.title: Quick Insert - Search Widget
all-modules.description:
Quickly find actors, items, spells etc. and insert them wherever you need them right now - the map, character sheets, roll tables, journals, you name it.
  • Open with Ctrl + Space (default)
  • Hold Shift to select more than one result
  • Drag and drop directly from the search results

all-modules.name: rangefinder
all-modules.title: Rangefinder
all-modules.description: Quckly find out how far something is away form you. Pressing Alt Gr (this key can be changed) will show a ruler between your token and the area you're hovering.

all-modules.name: rest-recovery
all-modules.title: Rest Recovery for 5E
all-modules.description: Adds 5e long and short rest mechanics and variant rules, such as feats, class features, and hit-dice healing.

all-modules.name: scene-packer
